## Type of change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature / enhancement
- [ ] API drift update (upstream schema changed)

## Checklist

- [ ] `pytest` passes (52+ tests, no network required)
- [ ] `ruff check src tests` clean
- [ ] `ruff format --check src tests` clean
- [ ] `mypy src` clean
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] New or changed public fields documented in `docs/fields-reference.md`
- [ ] Fixtures updated and redacted if a new endpoint was touched
